content:
# Referral Limits and Eligibility

## Eligibility Checks
Use referral limits before confirming that a customer can earn or receive a referral reward. A referral may proceed only if the customer is within the rolling referral limit and still has room under the applicable program's annual cap. Program-specific product fit and reward terms are covered separately; see "Personal Checking Referral Programs" and "Business Checking Referral Programs" when the account type determines the program.

## Rolling Referral Limit
Apply a rolling window of 9 days to referral activity. Within that window, a customer may have no more than 2 referrals counted toward the limit. Count referrals inside the window before discussing a new referral as eligible. If the requested referral would exceed the rolling-window maximum, explain that the customer must wait until enough prior referral activity falls outside the 9-day window.

## Annual Program Caps
Each referral program has its own annual cap. The configured annual caps are 5, 10, 3, 6, 12, 12, 10, 8, 5 and must be matched to the specific program before eligibility is confirmed. If a customer has reached the cap for one program, do not treat unused capacity in another program as transferable unless that program independently applies to the customer and referral.
title: Referral Limits and Eligibility
